potential_missing.source_sentence: They can either select a category or choose a price range.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall display matching users based on the chosen criteria after the user selects a filter.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When a person wants to search for users, they can start by choosing how they want to filter the results.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall provide an option for users to choose between different filtering methods.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall display matching users based on the chosen criteria after the user selects a filter.
hallucinations.reason: The original text does not explicitly state that the system will end after displaying matching users, only that it 'ends'.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to search for other users by selecting a price range as a filter.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is redundant with the first one, which already covers filtering categories.
